Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.core

Class ErsapComponent

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.core.ErsapComponent
public final class ErsapComponent extends Object
ERSAP component. This is used to define service, container, DPE and orchestrator components.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • orchestrator

      public static ErsapComponent orchestrator(String name, String dpeHost, int dpePort, String dpeLang, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP orchestrator.
      Parameters:
      name - of the orchestrator
      dpeHost - host of the PDE to communicate with
      dpePort - port of the DPE to communicate with
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the orchestrator to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of this orchestrator
      Returns:
      orchestrator ErsapComponent object

    • orchestrator

      public static ErsapComponent orchestrator(String name, String dpeHost, String dpeLang, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP orchestrator. Uses default DPE port.
      Parameters:
      name - of the orchestrator
      dpeHost - host of the PDE to communicate with
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the orchestrator to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of this orchestrator
      Returns:
      the orchestrator component

    • orchestrator

      public static ErsapComponent orchestrator(String name, String dpeHost, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP orchestrator. Default port of the DP and Java lang is used.
      Parameters:
      name - of the orchestrator
      dpeHost - host of the PDE to communicate with
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the orchestrator to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of this orchestrator
      Returns:
      the orchestrator component

    • orchestrator

      public static ErsapComponent orchestrator(String name, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP orchestrator. DPE on the local host, with the default port and Java lang is used.
      Parameters:
      name - of the orchestrator
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the orchestrator to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of this orchestrator
      Returns:
      the orchestrator component

    • dpe

      public static ErsapComponent dpe(String dpeHost, int dpePort, String dpeLang, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP DPE component.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host where the DPE will run
      dpePort - port of the DPE will use
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the DPE to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the DPE
      Returns:
      the DPE component

    • dpe

      public static ErsapComponent dpe(String dpeHost, String dpeLang, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP DPE component. The default DPE port is used.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host where the DPE will run
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the DPE to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the DPE
      Returns:
      the DPE component

    • dpe

      public static ErsapComponent dpe(String dpeHost, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP DPE component. The default DPE port and Java lang is used.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host where the DPE will run
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the DPE to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the DPE
      Returns:
      the DPE component

    • dpe

      public static ErsapComponent dpe(int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP DPE component. The local host, default DPE port and Java lang is used.
      Parameters:
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the DPE to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the DPE
      Returns:
      the DPE component

    • dpe

      public static ErsapComponent dpe()
      Creates and returns ERSAP DPE component. DPE default settings are used
      Returns:
      the DPE component

    • dpe

      public static ErsapComponent dpe(String canonicalName, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP DPE component from the ERSAP component canonical name.. DPE default pool-size = 1 is used.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - The canonical name of a component
      description - textual description of the DPE
      Returns:
      the DPE component

    • dpe

      public static ErsapComponent dpe(String canonicalName)
      Creates and returns ERSAP DPE component from the ERSAP component canonical name.. DPE default pool-size = 1 is used, leaving description of the DPE undefined.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - The canonical name of a component
      Returns:
      the DPE component

    • container

      public static ErsapComponent container(String dpeHost, int dpePort, String dpeLang, String container, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Container component.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host of the DPE where container is/(will be) deployed
      dpePort - port of the DPE where container is/(will be) deployed
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      container - the name of the container
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the container to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the container
      Returns:
      the container component

    • container

      public static ErsapComponent container(String dpeHost, String dpeLang, String container, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Container component. The default DPE port is used.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host of the DPE where container is/(will be) deployed
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      container - the name of the container
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the container to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the container
      Returns:
      the container component

    • container

      public static ErsapComponent container(String dpeHost, String container, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Container component. The default DPE port and Java lang is used.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host of the DPE where container is/(will be) deployed
      container - the name of the container
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the container to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the container
      Returns:
      the container component

    • container

      public static ErsapComponent container(String container, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Container component. The DPE running on a local host, default DPE port and Java lang is used.
      Parameters:
      container - the name of the container
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the container to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the container
      Returns:
      the container component

    • container

      public static ErsapComponent container(String containerCanonicalName, String description)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Container component, using the container canonical name. Default subscriptions pool-size = 1 is used.
      Parameters:
      containerCanonicalName - the canonical name of the container
      description - textual description of the container
      Returns:
      the container component

    • container

      public static ErsapComponent container(String containerCanonicalName)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Container component, using the container canonical name. Default subscriptions pool-size = 1 is used.
      Parameters:
      containerCanonicalName - the canonical name of the container
      Returns:
      the container component

    • service

      public static ErsapComponent service(String dpeHost, int dpePort, String dpeLang, String container, String engine, String engineClass, int subscriptionPoolSize, String description, String initialState)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Service component.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host of the DPE where service is/(will be) deployed
      dpePort - port of the DPE where service is/(will be) deployed
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      container - the name of the container of the service
      engine - the name of the service engine
      engineClass - engine full class name (package name)
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size for the service to be used for subscriptions
      description - textual description of the service
      initialState - the initial state of the service
      Returns:
      the service component

    • service

      public static ErsapComponent service(String dpeHost, int dpePort, String dpeLang, String container, String engine)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Service component. Default pool-size=1 is used. The description of the service is undefined.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host of the DPE where service is/(will be) deployed
      dpePort - port of the DPE where service is/(will be) deployed
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      container - the name of the container of the service
      engine - the name of the service engine
      Returns:
      the service component

    • service

      public static ErsapComponent service(String dpeHost, String dpeLang, String container, String engine)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Service component. DPE default port and default pool-size=1 is used. The description of the service is undefined.
      Parameters:
      dpeHost - host of the DPE where service is/(will be) deployed
      dpeLang - language of the DPE
      container - the name of the container of the service
      engine - the name of the service engine
      Returns:
      the service component

    • service

      public static ErsapComponent service(String container, String engine)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Service component. DPE running on a local host with the default port and default pool-size=1 is used. The description of the service is undefined.
      Parameters:
      container - the name of the container of the service
      engine - the name of the service engine
      Returns:
      the service component

    • service

      public static ErsapComponent service(String container, String engine, int poolSize)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Service component. DPE running on a local host with the default port used. The description of the service is undefined.
      Parameters:
      container - the name of the container of the service
      engine - the name of the service engine
      poolSize - pool size for the service subscriptions
      Returns:
      the service component

    • service

      public static ErsapComponent service(String serviceCanonicalName)
      Creates and returns ERSAP Service component, using the service canonical name. Default subscriptions pool-size = 1 is used. The description of the service is undefined.
      Parameters:
      serviceCanonicalName - canonical name of the service
      Returns:
      the service component

    • getTopic

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.core.xMsgTopic getTopic()
      Returns the topic of the ERSAP component, i.e. the topic of the xMsg subscriber. Note that all ERSAP components are registered as xMsg subscribers.
      Returns:
      xMsgTopic object

      public String getDpeLang()

      public String getDpeHost()

    • getDpePort

      public int getDpePort()

    • getDpeCanonicalName

      public String getDpeCanonicalName()
      Returns DPE canonical, constructed as "dpeHost % dpePort _ dpeLang".
      Returns:
      DPE canonical name

    • getContainerName

      public String getContainerName()

    • getEngineName

      public String getEngineName()

    • getEngineClass

      public String getEngineClass()

    • setEngineClass

      public void setEngineClass(String engineClass)
      Sets the engine class which is the package name of the class.
      Parameters:
      engineClass - package name of the class

    • getCanonicalName

      public String getCanonicalName()

    • setCanonicalName

      public void setCanonicalName(String canonicalName)
      Note. candidate to be deprecated. Do not use to define the canonical names for DPE, container or service. The canonical name of a ERSAP component is defined internally, yet this method is used to set the name of an orchestrator, which considers to be non critical.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - canonical name

    • getSubscriptionPoolSize

      public int getSubscriptionPoolSize()

    • setSubscriptionPoolSize

      public void setSubscriptionPoolSize(int subscriptionPoolSize)
      Sets the subscription pool-size of the component.
      Parameters:
      subscriptionPoolSize - pool size

    • isOrchestrator

      public boolean isOrchestrator()

    • isDpe

      public boolean isDpe()

    • isContainer

      public boolean isContainer()

    • isService

      public boolean isService()

    • getProxyAddress

      public org.jlab.coda.xmsg.net.xMsgProxyAddress getProxyAddress()
      Returns the DPE proxy address.
      Returns:
      xMsgProxyAddress object

      public String getDescription()
